Dialog external-call code in this directory is owned by DialogR.

Use this directory for DialogR-specific dialog external-call logic that does not belong
in shared provider code.

If DialogR external-call code is reusable by more than one product and it is R-specific,
move it under shared/runtime/providers/r/external/.

If it is reusable by all products and all providers, move it under
shared/external/.
